mapper.select:
SELECT RESULT_DATE, SUM(RESULT_COUNT) AS RESULT_COUNT FROM (
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') + ((LEVEL-1)/24),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24(TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') - TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1)12#{year_count} UNION
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')||':00' AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count
FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE (ACCESS_IP IS NULL OR ACCESS_IP != '10.9.32.167')
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND member_id = #{member_id}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm')
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy')
) GROUP BY result_date ORDER BY result_date ASC

SELECT a.result_date, sum(b.result_count) AS result_count , b.browser_type FROM (
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') + ((LEVEL-1)/24),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS browser_type
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 (TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') - TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1)12#{year_count} ) a, (
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')||':00' AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, browser_type
FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE (ACCESS_IP IS NULL OR ACCESS_IP != '10.9.32.167')
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND member_id = #{member_id}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24'), browser_type) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), browser_type) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm'), browser_type) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy'), browser_type) b
WHERE a.result_date = b.result_date(+) GROUP BY a.result_date, b.browser_type ORDER BY a.result_date ASC

SELECT a.result_date, sum(b.result_count) AS result_count , b.operating_system FROM (
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') + ((LEVEL-1)/24),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS operating_system
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 (TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') - TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1)12#{year_count} ) a, (
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')||':00' AS RESULT_DATE, COUNT(*) AS result_count, operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, operating_system
FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE (ACCESS_IP IS NULL OR ACCESS_IP != '10.9.32.167')
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND member_id = #{member_id}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24'), operating_system) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), operating_system) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm'), operating_system) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy'), operating_system) b
WHERE a.result_date = b.result_date(+) GROUP BY a.result_date, b.operating_system ORDER BY a.result_date ASC

SELECT a.result_date, sum(b.result_count) AS result_count , b.access_system FROM (
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') + ((LEVEL-1)/24),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS access_system
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 (TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') - TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1)12#{year_count} ) a, (
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')||':00' AS RESULT_DATE, COUNT(*) AS result_count, access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, COUNT(*) AS result_count, access_system
FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE (ACCESS_IP IS NULL OR ACCESS_IP != '10.9.32.167')
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND member_id = #{member_id}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24'), access_system) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), access_system) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm'), access_system) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy'), access_system) b
WHERE a.result_date = b.result_date(+) GROUP BY a.result_date, b.access_system ORDER BY a.result_date ASC
SELECT access_ip FROM ( SELECT access_ip FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS WHERE member_seq_no = #{seq_no} ORDER BY access_idx DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
